# Methodology

Describe the methodology, data, models, experiments, or analytical approach used
in the thesis.

## Figures and Tables

ITU requires figures and tables to be mentioned in the text before they appear.
Figure captions appear below figures, and table captions appear above tables.

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| x | Example input variable |
| y | Example output variable |

: Example table caption.

## Equations

Use standard display math for equations.

$$
y_t = \phi_1 y_{t-1} + \epsilon_t
$$ {#eq-ar1}

Refer to equations in text, for example Equation @eq-ar1.
